headline: How The PepsiCo (PEP) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Targets And Fair Value Reset
summary: PepsiCo's modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$171.38 to US$170.54, a small reset that still attracted a mix of higher and lower analyst price targets across recent reports. Some analysts are lifting targets, including moves to US$181 and other double digit upward revisions, while others are cutting by US$2 to US$7 as they reassess how quickly pricing and product plans might show up in the numbers. As you read on, you will see how to track this evolving narrative and what it...

headline: PepsiCo seen posting in-line Q1 as analysts flag North America turnaround
summary: PepsiCo Inc (NASDAQ:PEP, XETRA:PEP) is expected to report largely in-line first-quarter results later this month, with investor attention focused on geopolitical risks and early signs of a turnaround in its North American foods business, according to analysts at Bank of America. headline: PepsiCo Cuts Snack Prices Up To 15% After Doritos Jump Nearly 50%
summary: Price reductions follow volume declines, retailer pressure, and lost shelf space as Frito-Lay struggles to regain demand.

headline: Top Procurement & Supply Chain Leaders Set to Speak in Chicago This Month
summary: London, 07/04/2026 – BizClik, Procurement Magazine and Supply Chain Digital have announced a strong lineup of industry leaders that will take the stage at Procurement & Supply Chain LIVE: The US Summit. Taking place at Navy Pier, Chicago, on 21-22 April 2026, the speaker line-up features executives from leading global organisations including PepsiCo, Constellation Brands, Regions Bank, Coinbase, Reynolds American, Trane Technologies, and BDO USA. headline: PepsiCo Festival Exit Puts Brand Risk And Valuation In Spotlight
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) has withdrawn its sponsorship from a major UK music festival headlined by Kanye West. The decision follows controversy around the artist and reflects the company’s focus on brand reputation and stakeholder expectations. The move affects one of PepsiCo’s high profile marketing partnerships in the UK live events space. For a business built on global beverage and snack brands, PepsiCo’s marketing choices are central to how consumers and partners view the company...
